name: sandbox
description: Full workshop: read/write/patch/search files, run shell commands and background processes, browse the web, keep notes (memory) and a task list (todo), search your own history, use skills, and run code — the hermes tool surface. Plus your own chara-life tools (speak, rest, wish).
note: Network is ON by default; the operator can turn it off at runtime (/net off). Web and browser tools use the network; the browser tools also need the agent-browser driver installed and dir/docker isolation — they stay hidden until then.
